description_long: This hardware store consists of a modular arrangement of blocky, rectilinear structures, each with a flat roof and a variety of colored accents along the facades. The main building sections are grouped in two prominent clusters, with multiple entryways and large, open archways suggesting accessible entrances. Surrounding the main structures are numerous smaller components, possibly representing display racks, shelving, or outdoor storage areas, each color-coded for organization. The color palette includes grays, whites, and a range of accent colors such as orange, green, blue, and red, which may indicate different departments or product zones. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function and clear segmentation of space. There are no visible decorative elements, signage, or advertisements, emphasizing practicality and straightforward navigation.
description: A modular, blocky hardware store with flat roofs, colored accents, and multiple open entryways, surrounded by organized outdoor display or storage units.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building clusters with colored accents and a wide array of smaller, organized components in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main structures and the linear arrangement of the smaller exterior elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main building clusters and the full extent of the modular layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the lengthwise organization of the smaller components and the rear facades of the main structures.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront exterior is organized into two main building clusters with multiple open archways and a series of smaller, color-coded display or storage units arranged in front and to the sides.
